subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Wronged One of the horizons unto one of His friends who hath migrated from his station, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این کتابیست از مظلوم آفاق بیکی از دوستانش که از مقام خود هجرت نموده تا آنکه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
